original_hypothesis.title: Artist Payment Desync via Emergency Withdraw
original_hypothesis.hypothesis_description: emergencyWithdraw sweeps the entire ETH balance to the admin but does not clear the collectionTotalAmount records. Subsequent calls to payArtist will attempt to distribute non-existent ETH, failing silently and erasing the accounting of owed funds.
original_hypothesis.investigation_rationale: Emergency functions that bypass standard accounting mechanisms create severe state desynchronization.
preconditions: collectionTotalAmount > 0 for at least one collection

initial_operational_evidence.suspicious_workflow: Emergency withdraw breaks the core assumption that balance >= sum(collectionTotalAmount)
initial_operational_evidence.exploitation_window: After emergencyWithdraw and before funds are returned

operational_questions: What is the operational procedure for using emergencyWithdraw?
How are artists compensated if emergencyWithdraw is used?
validation_requirements: Test calling emergencyWithdraw followed by payArtist and observe accounting erasure

preliminary_attack_methodology.phase_1: Admin calls emergencyWithdraw during an incident, draining the contract
preliminary_attack_methodology.phase_2: An artist (or anyone) calls payArtist for their collection
preliminary_attack_methodology.phase_3: The ETH transfers fail silently because the contract is empty
preliminary_attack_methodology.phase_4: collectionTotalAmount is zeroed, permanently destroying the record of what the artist was owed
preliminary_attack_methodology.coordination_requirements: Requires admin action followed by user action

potential_operational_impact.operational_disruption: Loss of on-chain accounting for artist royalties
potential_operational_impact.recovery_difficulty: Requires manual off-chain calculation of owed funds

investigation_priorities.on_chain_signals: payArtist called when contract balance is 0
investigation_priorities.operational_anomalies: Artists complaining about zeroed balances without receiving funds

validation_result.impact_summary: Filtered before validation: attack_realism is LOW
validation_result.detailed_analysis: This hypothesis was auto-rejected because its attack_realism grade is LOW. Preconditions require actions outside the attacker's control (off-chain compromise, victim cooperation, or admin collusion). No LLM validation was performed.
